title: OSU housing (Owen or not Owen) — pre-college infra todo stack
html:
TL;DR

  • Mid-May 2021, two months before OSU orientation: Yahir resolves "OSU housing (Owen or not Owen). ✅" — i.e., decided whether to room with Owen Davis or somebody else as his freshman roommate.
  • Full action stack: Dave travel situation (passport, location, sending it ✅), Jann gift basket (photo, flowers), python course scholarship, prom dress-up, counseling for Emilio and I, Emilio custodial account, Lola automatic dispenser?
  • "counseling for Emilio and I" — explicit therapy-for-both-brothers reference; pairs with the Ford prep note's therapist mention. Younger-brother caretaking loaded right next to gift-basket-for-Jann.
  • "python course scholarship" — the recurring 2020-2021 self-curriculum item, here reframed as a funded course, not just a self-learn aspiration.
  • One of three notes in this batch (2020 07 28 read book, 2021 06 14 dave fafsa, 2021 10 06 get back to jann about db) that triggers the Jann entity stub-promotion — "Jann gift basket" is the third+ mention of Jann in surfaced corpus.

Source quote

"-OSU housing (Owen or not Owen). ✅"

"-Jann Gift Basket (photo, flowers) / -python course scholarship / -prom dress up / -counseling for Emilio and I / -Emilio custodial account / -Lola automatic dispenser?"

Open questions

  • Did Yahir end up rooming with Owen? (Worth cross-referencing with later OSU-housing notes.)
  • Was the Emilio custodial brokerage account actually opened?
  • Who is the "Dave" whose travel + passport Yahir is coordinating? Same Dave as the July 2021 confrontational message?

Wikilinks
